summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Order line creation feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. The fix properly implements line creation logic: extracted lines are mapped to BC sales lines, resolved_lines array is returned by preflight, and lines_added count is displayed in success view.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning in console when rendering resolved lines table (<tr> inside <span>)

passed_tests: Unit tests: 8/8 _resolve_sales_lines function tests pass
GET /api/gpi-integration/status - returns configured=true with split environment
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns resolved_lines array with line details
Preflight returns already_created=true for docs with existing SO, includes lines_added/lines_total
Preflight returns resolved_lines with 2 items (Widget A, Widget B) for doc 44b2e236
Preflight correctly shows 7 lines for order confirmation doc 29be78fe
Preflight returns 404 for non-existent documents
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/from-document/{doc_id} - idempotency returns already_exists with lines_added/lines_total preserved
Idempotency preserves lines_added=2 for doc b3c5ddaa (SO 107039)
Idempotency preserves lines_added=7 for doc 29be78fe (SO 107040)
from-document returns 422 with missing_customer error when no customer mapped
Frontend: Login flow works with admin/admin credentials
Frontend: Document detail page loads correctly
Frontend: BC Sales Order panel visible on Sales_Order documents
Frontend: Success view shows 'BC SALES ORDER CREATED' with lines '2/2 added' for existing SO
Frontend: Preflight button triggers API call and shows preflight view
Frontend: PreflightView shows resolved lines table with Type, Description, Qty, Unit Price, Total columns
Frontend: PreflightView shows 'SALES LINES (2)' with Widget A and Widget B details
Frontend: PreflightView shows customer override input when customer not mapped
Frontend: PreflightView shows mapped values (Environment, External Doc, Order Date, Total Amount, Idempotency Key)
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning when rendering table rows - consider wrapping dynamic content differently to avoid <span> inside <tbody>

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 API tests passed, 8/8 unit tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Test documents eb589bf0 and 4369047f were created for testing fallback scenarios (automatically cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SO 107039 exists for doc b3c5ddaa (2 lines). SO 107040 exists for doc 29be78fe (7 lines). Doc 44b2e236 is eligible for SO creation but has no customer mapped. The _resolve_sales_lines function correctly maps extracted line_items to BC format. Fallback item code FREIGHT is configured in .env for documents without line items.
